name: CEIL
comment: Rounds a float value up to the next whole number
lua:
-- 0x11E019C8F43ACC8A · build 1207
local value = 0.0
local result = Ceil(value)

name: TIMERA
comment: Counts up. Every 1000 is 1 real-time second. Use SETTIMERA(int value) to set the timer (e.g.: SETTIMERA(0)).
lua:
-- 0x83666F9FB8FEBD4B · build 1207
local result = Timera()

name: VDIST
comment:
Calculates distance between vectors.
The value returned will be in meters.
lua:
-- 0x2A488C176D52CCA5 · build 1207
local x1 = 0.0
local y1 = 0.0
local z1 = 0.0
local x2 = 0.0
local y2 = 0.0
local z2 = 0.0
local result = Vdist(x1, y1, z1, x2, y2, z2)

name: VDIST2
comment:
Calculates distance between vectors but does not perform Sqrt operations. (Its way faster)
The value returned will be in RAGE units.
lua:
-- 0xB7A628320EFF8E47 · build 1207
local x1 = 0.0
local y1 = 0.0
local z1 = 0.0
local x2 = 0.0
local y2 = 0.0
local z2 = 0.0
local result = Vdist2(x1, y1, z1, x2, y2, z2)

name: VMAG
comment: Calculates the magnitude of a vector.
lua:
-- 0x652D2EEEF1D3E62C · build 1207
local x = 0.0
local y = 0.0
local z = 0.0
local result = Vmag(x, y, z)

name: VMAG2
comment: Calculates the magnitude of a vector but does not perform Sqrt operations. (Its way faster)
lua:
-- 0xA8CEACB4F35AE058 · build 1207
local x = 0.0
local y = 0.0
local z = 0.0
local result = Vmag2(x, y, z)
